extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the laptop trackpad is cracked due to their bag being squeezed on a bus.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a hand on the laptop trackpad, which appears to be in good condition with no visible cracks.

result.user_claim: Customer: I travel with this laptop every day, and yesterday was a mess because my bag got squeezed between two seats on the bus. | Support: Did the laptop stop working after that? | Customer: Not immediately. I used it for a while and thought everything was normal. Then during a call I noticed the cursor movement felt strange. I restarted the laptop, cleaned the surface, and even checked if my mouse settings changed. | Support: Are you reporting a software issue or physical damage? | Customer: That is what confused me. At first I thought it was software, then I noticed the lower palm-rest area looked slightly off. | Support: Which part do you want the images reviewed for? | Customer: Not the screen, keyboard, or hinge. The actual claim is that the trackpad is cracked.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed trackpad with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: The claimed issue (crack) is not visible. Images show 'none' instead. Claim is contradicted by visual evidence.
